inbox page shows list or meaningful empty state
orders and logs pages render non-blank states

specs.title: pilot control shows health and safety counters
products intelligence shows overview and gallery
ai agent settings page renders with masked secrets
profile page renders and persists preferences
theme, color, language, and sidebar persist across reload
preferences do not reset after logout and login
